settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your project data and preferences.

appLanguage.heading: App Language
appLanguage.description: Choose the language for Zagafy's interface — menus, buttons, and labels. This is separate from your project's writing language below and never affects your manuscript or AI output.

projectLanguage.heading: Project Language
projectLanguage.description: Set the language for your project. All AI analysis, ingestion, and assistant responses will use this language. Content will never be translated.

writerMemory.heading: Writer Memory
writerMemory.description: The AI coach builds up observations about your craft (pacing, dialogue, description, plot, voice) as you run it. The top three are folded back into future micro-prompts and coaching sessions. Browse them under <link>Writing Map</link>.
writerMemory.remembered: Currently remembered: {count, plural, one {# observation} other {# observations}}.
writerMemory.confirmMessage: Clear all {count, plural, one {# observation} other {# observations}} the AI coach has built up about your craft? Future suggestions will start fresh. This cannot be undone.

spellcheck.heading: Spellcheck
spellcheck.description: Use the browser's built-in spellchecker on writing surfaces. Turn this off when you're polishing dialect, made-up names, or invented vocabulary and the red squiggles get in the way.
spellcheck.roadmap: A richer grammar layer (LanguageTool) is on the roadmap — see docs/ROADMAP.md.

exportProject.heading: Export Project
exportProject.description: Download your entire Story Bible, manuscript, characters, and timeline as a JSON file. You can use this for backup or to process with other tools.

restoreProject.heading: Restore Project
restoreProject.description: Import a previously exported JSON file to restore your Story Bible. This will replace all current data.
restoreProject.confirmMessage: This will replace ALL current project data with the imported file. A backup of your current data will be saved automatically.
restoreProject.parseError: Failed to parse JSON file. Make sure it is a valid Story Bible export.
restoreProject.tooLarge: Import file is too large (max {mb} MB).

analytics.heading: Analytics
analytics.description: Privacy-friendly analytics help us understand how Zagafy is used. No manuscript content is ever collected. Session recordings mask all text.
analytics.dntNote: Your browser has Do-Not-Track enabled. Analytics are automatically disabled.
analytics.enabled: Analytics enabled. Reload for changes to take full effect.
analytics.disabled: Analytics disabled. Reload for changes to take full effect.

onboarding.heading: Onboarding Tour
onboarding.description: Replay the guided tour that introduces the main areas of Zagafy. Useful if you skipped it during setup or want a quick refresher.

danger.heading: Danger Zone
danger.description: Permanently delete all project data from your browser's local storage. Make sure you have exported your data first if you want to keep it.
danger.confirmMessage: This will permanently delete all your project data from local storage. This cannot be undone. Make sure you have exported your data first.

kdp.heading: KDP Formatting Preview
kdp.noChapters: Add chapters on the Manuscript page to enable export.

blurb.heading: Back-Cover Blurb
blurb.description: Generate market-ready jacket copy / book description — a hooky, spoiler-free pitch for the back cover and your retail product page.
blurb.needTitle: Set a title in Story Setup to enable generation.

marketing.heading: Marketing / Amazon Copy
marketing.description: A full KDP listing package: product description, editorial hook, search keywords, browse categories, and A+ bullet points.
marketing.needTitle: Set a title in Story Setup to enable generation.

logline.heading: Logline & Elevator Pitch
logline.description: One-sentence loglines, a 30-second elevator pitch, a punchy tagline, and an "X meets Y" comp line — for queries, conferences, and quick pitches.
logline.needTitle: Set a title in Story Setup to enable generation.

tracker.heading: Submission Tracker
tracker.empty: No submissions tracked yet. Click "Add Submission" to get started.

dashboard.noSynopsis: No synopsis added yet. Head to the Story Bible to define your core narrative.

block.fearHeadline: You showed up. That takes courage.
block.fearNudge: Write one paragraph nobody will ever see.
block.perfectionismHeadline: First drafts are supposed to be messy.
block.directionHeadline: You don't need to know the ending.
block.directionNudge: Write the next scene you can see.

health.issues: {count, plural, one {# story health issue} other {# story health issues}} detected
health.plotHoles: {count, plural, one {# plot hole} other {# plot holes}}

dashboard.emptyChaptersSubtitle: Every great manuscript begins with a single chapter.
dashboard.emptyLoopsSubtitle: Your narrative threads are all accounted for.

projects.title: Your Stories
projects.subtitle: Every project keeps its own manuscript, characters, history, and writing stats.
projects.emptySubtitle: Create your first story to begin.
projects.confirmDeleteMessage: Delete "{title}" and all its chapters, characters, history, and stats? This cannot be undone.

genesis.tagline: Build your story from the ground up.
genesis.importInstead: Already have a manuscript? Import it instead

name.label: Project Name
name.description: What will you call this story?

logline.label: Logline
logline.description: Describe your story in one or two sentences.

genre-tone.label: Genre & Tone
genre-tone.description: Pick the genres and tones that define your narrative.

world.label: World
world.description: Where and when does this story take place?

placeholders.name: e.g., The Obsidian Crown
placeholders.logline: e.g., A disgraced knight must reclaim a cursed artifact before it destroys the realm.
placeholders.worldTime: Time period (e.g., Medieval, 2150 AD, Victorian era)

profile.heading: Profile
profile.description: Your local identity in Zagafy. Stored in this browser only — no account or sign-in required.

diagnostic.title: Before you begin...
diagnostic.subtitle: How are you feeling about writing today? This helps Zagafy adapt to where you are right now.
diagnostic.streak: Check-in streak: {count, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}

blocks.perfectionismDesc: Nothing I write feels good enough
blocks.directionDesc: I don't know where to go next

ritual.title: Take a moment before you begin
ritual.subtitle: Choose how you'd like to transition into your writing.
ritual.inspirationDesc: A quote to spark your session

heteronyms.heading: Alter Egos
heteronyms.explainer: An alter ego is a writing voice — a persona with its own tone, vocabulary, and pacing. Pick one in Flow mode and the AI (micro-prompts, coach, chat) shapes its suggestions to match that voice. Use them to write distinct POVs or characters in their own style. Alter egos are saved per project.
heteronyms.empty: No alter egos yet. Create one to get started.
heteronyms.deleteMessage: This alter ego will be permanently removed. If it is currently active, writing will switch back to your default voice.

modal.bioPlaceholder: Who is this writer? Where do they come from?

editor.additionalPlaceholder: e.g. 'Uses metaphors from the sea, avoids contractions'
editor.styleNotePlaceholder: How do they write? e.g. 'Fragmented sentences, raw emotion'

switch.title: Switch Voice
switch.noOthers: No other voices available. Create alter egos in Settings.
